headline: JPM, BCS & FITB Sued by Tricolor Noteholders Over Alleged Red Flags
summary: JPMorgan, Barclays and Fifth Third face a fresh lawsuit as Tricolor noteholders allege ignored audit red flags in ABS deals now trading at under 10 cents on the dollar.

raw.headline: JPM, BCS & FITB Sued by Tricolor Noteholders Over Alleged Red Flags
raw.summary: JPMorgan, Barclays and Fifth Third face a fresh lawsuit as Tricolor noteholders allege ignored audit red flags in ABS deals now trading at under 10 cents on the dollar.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $67
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $60 to $67.
